Petition For Construction Of Trust Language,Instructions Re: Revocation Of Trust And Disposition Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Construction Of Trust Language,Instructions Re: Revocation Of Trust And Disposition Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Continued To Sep-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Construction Of Trust Language,Instructions Re: Revocation Of Trust And Disposition Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Continued To Apr-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kymberleigh Damron-Hsiao for BBIPL. Nikka Raplin and Karen Johnson-McKewan for BBL. David McCarthy and Darin Donovan for EAS.

The Court stated that it was aware that BBL filed a Declaratory Relief action and that the same issues were raised in the trust petition. Counsel provided oral argument to support their positions with regard to the validity of the trust and its provisions, whether it was an employee benefit arrangement or a trust, whether California law or the probate code applies, distribution of the assets to BBL and the power to revoke the trust. The probate case is being put over until the Declaratory Relief action filed in the Civil division moves further along as both actions are trying to do the same thing. The matter was continued to April 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the civil matter.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
